use_cases: Displaying success messages after form submissions or completed actions
Showing error messages for validation failures or system errors
Presenting warning notifications for system status or maintenance
Communicating informational messages to guide user behavior
Highlighting destructive or critical alerts that require immediate attention
ai_summary: A reusable alert/notification component with variant support for default and destructive states. Built with CVA for type-safe variant management and includes sub-components (AlertTitle, AlertDescription) for structured content. Uses semantic HTML with role="alert" for accessibility and integrates with a design token system for consistent styling across platforms.
